scripts.build: next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const copyDir=(src, dest)=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file=>{ const s=path.join(src, file); const d=path.join(dest, file); if(fs.lstatSync(s).isDirectory()) copyDir(s, d); else fs.copyFileSync(s, d); }); }; copyDir('.next/static', '.next/standalone/.next/static'); copyDir('public', '.next/standalone/public');"
